statusDetail: Anton completed the scheduled site-improvement loop and recorded the result.
actionRequired: No action needed unless you want to review the latest commit.
summary:
Implemented the next Owner Workflow slice as Anton.

Added a structured Warning Light Note template in [garage.html](/C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/garage.html:167), linked it from the Diagnostics warning-light flow in [diagnostics.html](/C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/diagnostics.html:301), added search coverage in [search-data.js](/C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/search-data.js:492), extended browser-smoke assertions in [Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1](/C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/tools/audit/Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1:273), and bumped the service worker to `ridgeline-console-v261`.

Verification:
- `Test-InternalLinks.ps1` passed for 16 HTML files.
- Edge `--dump-dom` still hit the known missing-main failure.
- Playwright/Chrome fallback passed for Garage desktop/mobile, Diagnostics mobile route, `warning light note` search, no horizontal overflow, and Search Escape cleanup.
- Screenshots saved under `debug-screenshots/audit-v261-*`.

Updated `AGENT_STATE.md`, `AGENT_BACKLOG.md`, `ANTON_ROADMAP.md`, and `SITE_QUALITY_AUDIT.md`. No durable Anton behavior change was needed, so `ANTON.md` was left unchanged.

Next clean slice: a mobile density pass on the growing Diagnostics/Garage workflow surfaces, or a Garage dashboard section that surfaces recent diagnostic-note fields more clearly.
